practice_areas.name: Commercial
practice_areas.body: Customers, vendors, suppliers, and contract memory live here. Instructions pull profile detail and search negotiated terms.

practice_areas.name: Commercial Disputes
practice_areas.body: Counterparty profiles, claims, and dispute memory live here. Pulls contract context from Commercial.

practice_areas.name: Corporate
practice_areas.body: Entities, subsidiaries, and corporate memory live here. Instructions pull entity detail and search filings and resolutions.

practice_areas.name: Employment
practice_areas.body: Employees, contractors, and HR memory live here. Instructions pull profile detail and search agreements and policy versions.

practice_areas.name: Employment Disputes
practice_areas.body: Employee parties, grievances, and tribunal memory live here. Pulls employment context from Employment.

practice_areas.name: Privacy
practice_areas.body: Data subjects, processors, and privacy memory live here. Instructions pull profile detail and search processing records.

practice_areas.name: IP
practice_areas.body: Inventors, marks, and IP-portfolio memory live here. Instructions pull profile detail and search filings.

practice_areas.name: IP Disputes
practice_areas.body: Counterparty profiles, infringement claims, and IP-litigation memory live here. Pulls portfolio context from IP.

practice_areas.name: Regulatory
practice_areas.body: Regulators, obligations, and compliance memory live here. Instructions pull obligation detail and search filings.

practice_areas.name: Regulatory Disputes
practice_areas.body: Regulator parties, enforcement actions, and regulatory-dispute memory live here. Pulls obligation context from Regulatory.

practice_areas.name: Product
practice_areas.body: Products, releases, and product-agreement memory live here. Instructions pull product detail and search related contracts.

practice_areas.body: Models, datasets, and AI-governance memory live here. Instructions pull model detail and search risk artefacts.
